case_title: XIUZEN SITU VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF XIUZEN SITU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JUDY LOUIE, TELLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-27-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DARRYL BAYRAY, BRANCH MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
